issue.title: Add a workflow to audit `npm` and `pypi` packages in the project
issue.body:
### Terms

- [x] I have searched [open and closed feature requests](https://github.com/activist-org/activist/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Afeature)
- [x] I agree to follow activist's [Code of Conduct](.github/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

### Description

With the recent incidents within some of the open source communities, its safer for us to start auditing the packages/dependencies that we are integrating into our projects. Using [`pip-audit`](https://github.com/pypa/pip-audit) package for the backend and [`npm audit`](https://yarnpkg.com/cli/npm/audit) command for the frontend within out workflows would a good way to start checking if any of the dependencies are compromised.

cc @andrewtavis @nicki182 @to-sta 

### Contribution

_No response_

outcome.label: skip_correct
outcome.detail: Skipped: issue assigned to @sh-ran at vet time (verified live: assignee still on the closed issue).
